title: Meta webhook verify endpoint returns the challenge in production
evidence: GET https://api.kloel.com/webhooks/meta?hub.mode=subscribe&hub.verify_token=<production META_VERIFY_TOKEN>&hub.challenge=123456 returned HTTP 200 with body 123456
nextVerificationStep: Keep the Meta App dashboard using the production META_VERIFY_TOKEN value

title: Meta webhook signed POST is accepted in production
evidence: Signed POST to https://api.kloel.com/webhooks/meta returned HTTP 200 and body ok
nextVerificationStep: Replay a real Meta page/instagram/whatsapp payload after each channel-specific change

title: Meta OAuth callback route is published and redirects to the frontend contract
evidence: HEAD https://api.kloel.com/meta/auth/callback returned HTTP 302 to https://www.kloel.com/settings?section=apps&meta=error&reason=missing_params
nextVerificationStep: Run a full Embedded Signup redirect-return roundtrip against a real workspace session

title: WhatsApp Cloud production assets resolve from Meta Graph
tests: Live Graph API asset checks on 2026-04-22
evidence: WABA 2848659798820132 returned name Test WhatsApp Business Account
Phone number id 1055729897629826 returned display phone +1 555-634-5954 and verified name Test Number
nextVerificationStep: Exercise inbound and outbound Cloud traffic through the workspace-bound connection

title: Messenger page webhook routing is workspace-aware
evidence: Page and Instagram webhook events resolve workspace from metaConnection.pageId
nextVerificationStep: Replay a real page event for two distinct workspaces and confirm isolation end-to-end

title: Messenger official send and conversation endpoints exist
evidence: Messenger service posts to {pageId}/messages and fetches {pageId}/conversations via Graph
nextVerificationStep: Run a live page-token send smoke for the connected workspace

title: Instagram official profile/media/insights/send endpoints are wired to workspace Meta connection state
evidence: Controller resolves igAccountId and access token from the persisted workspace Meta connection
blockers: Current live page has no Instagram business account attached
nextVerificationStep: Connect a professional Instagram account to the page and rerun live profile + DM smoke

title: Current live page lacks a connected Instagram account
evidence: Page 994971940375552 returned no instagram_business_account and no connected_instagram_account
blockers: A professional Instagram account must be linked to the Page and authorized by the workspace owner
nextVerificationStep: Link the Instagram professional account to the Page and rerun Meta OAuth / status sync

title: Lead Ads form and lead retrieval exist through official Graph endpoints
evidence: Kloel retrieves {pageId}/leadgen_forms and {formId}/leads through Meta Graph
nextVerificationStep: Smoke the endpoints with a page token that has a real lead form

title: Lead Ads realtime webhook ingestion is implemented, deployed, and persisted in production
tests: Live signed webhook replay plus direct PostgreSQL validation on 2026-04-22
evidence: MetaLeadCapture now persists page.leadgen by workspace without inventing a CRM phone
MetaLeadgenService fetches lead details from Graph and only syncs Contact when a real phone exists
Page 994971940375552 now shows Kloel CIA subscribed for leadgen and feed
Signed POST to https://api.kloel.com/webhooks/meta returned HTTP 200 and body ok for leadgen_id pulse_live_20260422_0412
Production PostgreSQL stored workspaceId 7972562d-260a-4385-9260-854d7d2b3e4b, leadgenId pulse_live_20260422_0412, pageId 994971940375552, syncStatus fetch_failed
nextVerificationStep: Replay with a real Page access token to validate full lead fetch fields beyond the routing-only smoke

title: The current live Page is subscribed for Lead Ads realtime fields
evidence: POST /994971940375552/subscribed_apps with subscribed_fields=leadgen,feed returned success true
GET /994971940375552/subscribed_apps returned Kloel CIA subscribed for leadgen and feed
nextVerificationStep: Keep the Page subscribed while deploying the new webhook persistence code

title: The current live Page cannot yet subscribe Messenger realtime fields with the validated token
evidence: POST /994971940375552/subscribed_apps with messaging fields failed with Meta (#200) requiring pages_messaging
MetaAuthController now fails honestly with reason=page_subscription_failed when the callback cannot subscribe the Page
blockers: A token with effective pages_messaging must be granted to the Kloel CIA app for the connected Page
nextVerificationStep: Reauthorize with pages_messaging, rerun the page subscribed_apps POST for messaging fields, and then smoke Messenger send/receive

title: The Marketing WhatsApp surface now uses official Meta onboarding in the repository build and live app
evidence: MetaOfficialConnectPane replaces the Meta Cloud QR fallback with an official 'sem QR' onboarding pane
The new frontend test asserts the official pane renders without QR content
Live app.kloel.com smoke returned hasOfficial=true, hasQrInstruction=false, hasMetaButton=true after production switched to WHATSAPP_PROVIDER_DEFAULT=meta-cloud
Production /api/whatsapp-api/session/status for the smoke workspace now returns provider=meta-cloud with an official Meta authUrl
nextVerificationStep: Run one full official Meta callback roundtrip for the smoke workspace and persist the resulting MetaConnection

title: The Marketing Instagram and Facebook tabs no longer render dead-end Coming Soon overlays in the repository build or live app
evidence: ComingSoonOverlay was removed from the final render path for the Instagram and Facebook marketing tabs
Channel routing now keys off the real channel connection state instead of any generic Meta connection
Live app.kloel.com /marketing/instagram now renders 'Conectar Instagram' with no Em breve overlay
Live app.kloel.com /marketing/facebook now renders 'Conectar Facebook' with no Em breve overlay
nextVerificationStep: Complete a real Meta connect roundtrip for Instagram and Facebook once the external asset / permission blockers are removed

title: Meta app review runbook now points to the live callback and webhook hosts
tests: Live callback and webhook validation references
evidence: The runbook now uses api.kloel.com for data deletion, deauthorize, OAuth callback, and webhook callback
nextVerificationStep: Keep the runbook aligned with the production ingress if hosts change
